name: Banana-Coconut Bake (Akwadu)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cut each banana crosswise into halves.
3. Cut each half lengthwise into halves and arrange in a greased 9-inch pie plate.
4. Dot with margarine.
5. Drizzle with orange juice and lemon juice.
6. Sprinkle with brown sugar and shredded coconut.
7. Bake until the coconut is golden, for 8 to 10 minutes.
